name: Aventurine
description:
He wants you to always be reminded of him.

Holy shit finally, something that’s not angst. So about the angst Aventurine bot, it’s gonna be in the vault for a hot second until I decide it’s time to release a bunch of angst.

Today is a perfect day, both Deco*27 AND Utsu-P dropped new songs today. Kuchisake will now be my mew obsession for the foreseeable future until the next Utsu-P banger drops.

Art by Hoyoverse
creator: Mika_Hana
